## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Innerwell for AI-powered content operations and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and SEO services, with a focus on high-quality, programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Innerwell is interested in scaling their content operations efficiently while maintaining profitability](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Both companies have experience with global workforce management and AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [GrowthX's services start at $9,000/month for editorial content and $12,000/month for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Generation

  - [Uses custom-built workflows and AI agents for research, content creation, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Adapts workflows to client needs, especially for regulated industries like healthcare](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Offers end-to-end services, including strategy, content creation, and technical SEO support](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Innerwell's Content Needs and Goals

  - [Currently at $8 million in revenue, aiming for significant growth while maintaining profitability](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Interested in scaling content operations efficiently without extensive in-house resources](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Looking to expand beyond their current 90% paid acquisition strategy](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Have experience with state-level content pages (1,200+ pages created)](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### GrowthX's Technology Stack

  - [Custom-built framework for creating and managing AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Uses various AI models (GPT-4, Claude) depending on specific task requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Developing a code-based approach to knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [Plans to potentially expose their technology stack to clients in the future](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)

### Collaboration Possibilities

  - [GrowthX offers two main service tiers: editorial (50,000-100,000 words/month) and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [90-day initial period followed by a 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with technical SEO, site migrations, and other related services as part of their offering](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Potential to start working together as early as March 3rd, depending on availability](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### AI-Driven Hiring Processes

  - [GrowthX uses AI to streamline their hiring process, reviewing 4,000+ applicants efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Async video interviews and AI-powered application review reduce hiring time significantly](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)
  - [Focus on finding high-quality candidates globally, often paying above-market rates in certain geographies](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to add Innerwell team to a Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [GrowthX to send a Statement of Work (SOW) for Innerwell to review](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Innerwell to provide GrowthX with information on desired volume and aggressiveness of content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Both parties to continue discussions on potential collaboration and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/GnzpED_dzSUYHTF_DD_azHQEDAfR4-hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
